description: Japanese conglomerate manufacturing fine ceramics, semiconductor packages, crystal devices, and electronic components. Supplies ceramic packages and substrates for semiconductor industry since 1964.

_externalRelationships.notes: Core Components 28% of revenue, Electronic Components 18%, Solutions 54%. Fine ceramics for semiconductor processing equipment.

_metadata.notes: Diversified company - also makes solar cells, printers, mobile phones, cutting tools. Ceramic packages since 1964.
